---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve RailTwin-X Lite
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: Stormynubee
---

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Start the backend server `python -m server.main`
2. Run frontend app `npm run dev`
3. Click on ...
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior / Screenshots

What actually happens (add logs, error traces, or screenshots if applicable).

## Environment Details

- OS: (e.g. Windows, macOS, Linux)
- Python Version: (e.g. 3.11.x)
- Node.js Version: (e.g. 20.x)
- Browser: (e.g. Chrome, Firefox)
